<!-- Generated by harness generate-slash-commands. Do not edit. -->

<context>
Cognitive mode: constructive-architect
Type: flexible
</context>

<objective>
Delegate Capillary work to aiRA — a sub-agent that creates loyalty/CRM configurations (promotions, campaigns, audiences, coupons, journeys, milestones, rewards, badges, gift vouchers, templates) and runs analytics on Capillary data (Spark/SparkSQL, customer/ transaction/campaign metrics, plots). Invokes the bundled aira.py CLI which talks to the deployed aiRA backend over a daemon-held WebSocket.

Phases:

- precheck: Verify AIRA\_\* env vars are set; run aira health-check if anything is broken
- session: Create an aiRA session (or reuse an existing one) and capture the session_id
- delegate: Send the user's Capillary task as a chat message; for long-running turns invoke in the background
- interpret: Read streamed output — text replies, config artifacts, Python cells, plot/PDF paths — and surface results to the user
- recover: Handle 401 (re-login), session cap (list/kill), WS drops (re-run chat), and wrong-turn (interrupt) scenarios (optional)
  </objective>
